sql: SELECT id, name, status, department FROM users WHERE CASE WHEN #{role} = 'admin' THEN CASE WHEN #{dept} IS NOT NULL THEN department = #{dept} ELSE 1=1 END WHEN #{role} = 'manager' THEN status = 'active' ELSE status = 'public' END ORDER BY created_at DESC
templateSql:
SELECT id, name, status, department FROM users
<choose>
    <when test="role == 'admin'">
        <choose>
            <when test="dept != null">
                WHERE department = #{dept}
            </when>
            <otherwise>
                WHERE 1=1
            </otherwise>
        </choose>
    </when>
    <when test="role == 'manager'">
        WHERE status = 'active'
    </when>
    <otherwise>
        WHERE status = 'public'
    </otherwise>
</choose>
ORDER BY created_at DESC
